task_completion.description: Fetch and load the Zif268-DNA complex (PDB: 1AAY) into PyMOL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL GUI should be open with a molecular structure loaded, and '1AAY' should be visible in the object menu or command history.

task_completion.description: Identify the middle zinc ion (Finger 2) and measure the distances to its 4 coordinating protein residues.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer should show a zinc ion (sphere or cross) with distance measurement lines (dashed lines with numerical values) connecting it to four surrounding amino acid residues (Cys/His).

task_completion.description: Identify the specific DNA base that Arg46 (Arg146) hydrogen-bonds with in the major groove.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer should show focus on an Arginine residue (Arg146) interacting closely with a DNA base, potentially with distance measurements or highlighting indicating a hydrogen bond.

task_completion.description: Create a visualization focusing on Finger 2's interaction with the DNA and save it as a PNG.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL command line should show a 'png' command saving to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/zif268_finger2.png', or a file manager/terminal should show this file exists.

task_completion.description: Write a structural report containing the coordinating residues, average/list of distances, and the specific DNA base.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., using 'cat') showing the contents of '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/zif268_report.txt'. The text must mention the 4 coordinating residues (Cys137, Cys140, His153, His157), the distances (around 2.06-2.28A), and the DNA base 'Guanine'.

integrity.description: The agent used PyMOL to load and analyze the structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL graphical interface being actively used, rather than just a script being executed without visual confirmation.

integrity.description: The agent actually performed the distance measurements in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Measurement objects (dashed lines with distance values) should be visible in the PyMOL 3D viewer, proving the agent didn't just hallucinate the numbers.

integrity.description: The agent wrote the specific findings into the report file rather than copying the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report file contents should contain the specific derived answers (e.g., 'Guanine', specific residue numbers, specific distance values) rather than a generic copy-paste of the task instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: PDB ID: 1AAY. The middle zinc ion (ZN 202) coordinates with Cys137, Cys140, His153, and His157. The coordination distances range from 2.06A to 2.28A. Arg146 (referred to as Arg46 in the prompt) hydrogen-bonds with Guanine (specifically Guanine 7 of DNA chain B). The figure must be saved to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/zif268_finger2.png and the report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/zif268_report.txt.
